name.ja: <ruby>三<rt>さん</rt></ruby><ruby>幻<rt>げん</rt></ruby><ruby>魔<rt>ま</rt></ruby>の<ruby>霹<rt>へき</rt></ruby><ruby>靂<rt>れき</rt></ruby>

text.en: During your Main Phase: You can place 2 "Skyfire of the Sacred Beast" from your hand, Deck, and/or GY face-up on your field, then you can reveal 1 Level 10 "Sacred Beast" monster in your hand, then place 1 "Fallen Paradise of the Sacred Beasts" from your Deck face-up in your Field Zone. During your opponent's End Phase, if this card is in your GY: You can add it to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Skyfire of the Sacred Beast" once per turn.
